---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a product, UX, or platform improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["feature"]
assignees: []
---

## Feature Summary

Describe the requested capability in one short paragraph.

## Problem or Motivation

Explain the current limitation, workflow pain, or business need.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the preferred implementation or outcome.

## Alternatives Considered

List alternative approaches, tradeoffs, or rejected options.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Clear user or operator outcome
- [ ] Technical constraints identified
- [ ] Success can be verified
